sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113084" key="xalkideu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλκῐδ-εύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n113084.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be parsimonious,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Χαλκιδίζω.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
